authorization_reference: Statement of Work / Rules of Engagement reference
executive_summary: Summarize what was assessed, the most important validated exposure, business relevance, and the overall remediation direction in plain language.
strategic_recommendations: Validate and prioritize externally exploitable findings using business context.
Assign accountable remediation owners and target dates.
Perform a focused retest and preserve evidence of closure.
objectives: Identify externally observable assets, services, technologies, and security-relevant conditions within the authorized scope.
Provide reproducible evidence and prioritized, manually validated remediation guidance.
methodology: OWASP Web Security Testing Guide information gathering and reporting
NIST SP 800-115 technical security testing and assessment
limitations: Testing was limited to the targets and window defined in the rules of engagement.
No social engineering, physical testing, destructive activity, or distributed denial-of-service testing was performed.
Authenticated coverage was limited to the credentials supplied by the client.
assumptions: The supplied scope and credentials were complete and accurate during the assessment window.
